title: BEM-712 repeat Claude request
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/agreements/active','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff','governance/scheduled_tasks']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 05:32 (UTC+3)'
version='v2.1-global-patterns-2026-05-21-repeat'
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem712_repeat_bem703_strategy_request_final_decision_required.md')
content='# BEM-712 | FINAL DECISION REQUIRED | BEM-703 MULTI-AGENT STRATEGY '+version+sep+sep
content+='Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: FINAL_DECISION_REQUIRED'+sep+'Версия: '+version+sep+sep
content+='Claude, повторный запрос по BEM-703. Оператор требует довести согласование до результата без участия оператора.'+sep+sep
content+='## Нужно проверить'+sep
content+='1. Исходный пакет GPT: `governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem703_strategy_architecture_global_patterns_for_claude.md`.'+sep
content+='2. Замечания оператора: директор = управленческий контур стандартных ролей; иерархия контуров от работника до генерального директора; product repos связаны с control-plane через registry/connector/task bridge/evidence mirror.'+sep
content+='3. Мировые паттерны: OpenAI Agents SDK handoffs/guardrails/tracing, LangGraph supervisor/hierarchical, CrewAI Flows/Crews, AutoGen/Microsoft Agent Framework, production gaps: idempotency/checkpoint/recovery/audit.'+sep+sep
content+='## Требуется результат'+sep
content+='Дай явный вердикт по целевой архитектуре: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+sep
content+='## Required response format'+sep+'```'+sep+'BEM-703 | CLAUDE REVIEW | MULTI-AGENT STRATEGY v2.1'+sep+'Date: YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Accepted architecture: ...'+sep+'Required changes: ...'+sep+'Production blockers: ...'+sep+'Final recommendation: ...'+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep
mail.write_text(content)
active=Path('governance/agreements/active/bem703_multiagent_strategy_architecture_v21.json')
active_state={}
if active.exists():
    try: active_state=json.loads(active.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: active_state={}
active_state.update({'schema_version':'agreement_active.v2','agreement_id':'BEM-703','version':version,'status':'repeat_request_sent_to_claude_final_decision_required','mailbox_file':str(mail),'next_action':'monitor_claude_mailbox_until_approved_change_required_or_blocked','operator_role':'none_in_routine_loop','updated_at':created,'blocker':None})
active.write_text(json.dumps(active_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
monitor=Path('governance/scheduled_tasks/AI_DEVOPS_CLAUDE_MAILBOX_MONITOR_RECURRING_TASK.md')
old=monitor.read_text(errors='ignore') if monitor.exists() else ''
addition=sep+'## BEM-712 active scope update'+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Scope: BEM-703/BEM-712 final decision. Monitor paths: `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/`, `governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor/`. On APPROVED/CHANGE_REQUIRED/BLOCKED create Codex task to finalize or continue round. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep
monitor.write_text(old+addition if 'BEM-712 active scope update' not in old else old)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-703/BEM-712 MONITOR UNTIL RESULT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude was asked again for final decision. Continue checking mailbox until APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Operator is not relay.'+sep+sep+'Read active agreement: `governance/agreements/active/bem703_multiagent_strategy_architecture_v21.json`'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'repeat_claude_strategy_request_until_result.v1','bem':'BEM-712','status':'repeat_request_sent_to_claude','mailbox_file':str(mail),'active_file':str(active),'monitor_task_prompt':str(monitor),'operator_role':'none_in_routine_loop','next_action':'check_mailbox_until_result','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem712_repeat_claude_strategy_request_until_result.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem712_repeat_claude_strategy_request_until_result.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-712 | Repeat Claude Strategy Request Until Result | SENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Repeat final-decision request sent to Claude. Operator relay forbidden. Active agreement updated.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem712_repeat_claude_strategy_request_until_result','status':'repeat_request_sent_to_claude','mailbox_file':str(mail),'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem712_repeat_claude_strategy_request_until_result.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-712 SENT: repeat final-decision request sent to Claude for BEM-703.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(mail),str(active),str(monitor),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Repeated BEM-703 final decision request to Claude, updated active agreement and monitor scope, operator relay forbidden')
